query:
SELECT up.assigned_business_lines, up.territories, u.name
FROM userProfiles up
JOIN users u ON u.id = up.user_id
WHERE u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day')
LIMIT 10;
